rig.py.diff_text:
--- rig.py
+++ rig.py
@@ -1593,6 +1593,513 @@
     return 0

 

 

+def find_leaf_profiles(manifest: Manifest) -> list[str]:

+    """Find leaf profiles (profiles that no other profile extends)."""

+    all_profiles = set(manifest.profiles.keys())

+    extended_profiles = set()

+

+    for profile in manifest.profiles.values():

+        if profile.extends:

+            extended_profiles.add(profile.extends)

+

+    leaf_profiles = all_profiles - extended_profiles

+    return sorted(leaf_profiles)

+

+

+def get_referenced_source_files(modules: dict[str, ModuleConfig]) -> set[Path]:

+    """Get all source files referenced by link, copy, and run actions."""

+    source_files = set()

+

+    for module_name, module in modules.items():

+        for action in module.actions:

+            if action["type"] in ("link", "copy", "run"):

+                source = action["source"]

+                if source != "*":

+                    src_path = module.path / source

+                    if src_path.exists():

+                        source_files.add(src_path.resolve())

+

+    return source_files

+

+

+def copy_source_files(source_files: set[Path], package_dir: Path, base_dir: Path) -> dict[str, list[str]]:

+    """Copy source files to package preserving module directory structure.

+    Returns mapping of module name to list of copied file paths relative to package.

+    """

+    module_files: dict[str, list[str]] = {}

+

+    for src_path in source_files:

+        # Get relative path from base directory

+        try:

+            rel_to_base = src_path.relative_to(base_dir)

+        except ValueError:

+            # If not relative to base, use the full path relative to its module

+            rel_to_base = src_path.name

+

+        # Determine module directory (first component of the path)

+        parts = rel_to_base.parts

+        if len(parts) > 0:

+            module_dir = parts[0]

+        else:

+            module_dir = "."

+

+        # Copy to package preserving the relative path

+        dest_path = package_dir / rel_to_base

+        dest_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, ok=True)

+

+        # Copy the file

+        shutil.copy2(src_path, dest_path)

+

+        # Track module files

+        if module_dir not in module_files:

+            module_files[module_dir] = []

+        module_files[module_dir].append(str(rel_to_base))

+

+    return module_files

+

+

+def generate_installer_script(os_filter: str, plan_output: dict) -> str:

+    """Generate the executable installer bash script."""

+    script_parts = []

+

+    # Script header

+    script_parts.append('''#!/bin/bash

+# Rig installer - generated build artifact

+# Runs from package directory

+

+set -euo pipefail

+

+DRY_RUN="${DRY_RUN:-}"

+

+# Get the directory where this script is located

+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"

+

+# Change to script directory to ensure relative paths work

+cd "$SCRIPT_DIR"

+

+log_action() {

+    local prefix="[rig]"

+    local action="$1"

+    shift

+    if [ -n "$DRY_RUN" ]; then

+        echo "$prefix $action $*"

+    fi

+}

+

+execute_install() {

+    local manager="$1"

+    local target="$2"

+    case "$manager" in

+        brew)

+            brew install "$target"

+            ;;

+        apt)

+            sudo apt-get install -y "$target"

+            ;;

+        yum)

+            sudo yum install -y "$target"

+            ;;

+        *)

+            echo "Unknown manager: $manager"

+            exit 1

+            ;;

+    esac

+}

+

+install_package() {

+    local manager="$1"

+    local package="$2"

+    log_action "install_package" "$manager" "$package"

+    if [ -z "$DRY_RUN" ]; then

+        execute_install "$manager" "$package"

+    fi

+}

+

+install_application() {

+    local manager="$1"

+    local application="$2"

+    log_action "install_application" "$manager" "$application"

+    if [ -z "$DRY_RUN" ]; then

+        execute_install "$manager" "$application"

+    fi

+}

+

+link_action() {

+    local source="$1"

+    local destination="$2"

+    log_action "link" "$source" "$destination"

+    if [ -z "$DRY_RUN" ]; then

+        mkdir -p "$(dirname "$destination")" && ln -sf "$SCRIPT_DIR/$source" "$destination"

+    fi

+}

+

+copy_action() {

+    local source="$1"

+    local destination="$2"

+    log_action "copy" "$source" "$destination"

+    if [ -z "$DRY_RUN" ]; then

+        mkdir -p "$(dirname "$destination")" && cp -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/$source" "$destination"

+    fi

+}

+

+run_action() {

+    local source="$1"

+    log_action "run" "$source"

+    if [ -z "$DRY_RUN" ]; then

+        bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/$source"

+    fi

+}

+

+set_preference() {

+    log_action "set_preference" "$1"

+}

+

+configure_dock() {

+    log_action "configure_dock" "$@"

+}

+

+install_runtime() {

+    local manager="$1"

+    local language="$2"

+    local version="$3"

+    log_action "install_runtime" "$manager" "$language" "$version"

+}

+

+install_plugin() {

+    local manager="$1"

+    local plugin="$2"

+    log_action "install_plugin" "$manager" "$plugin"

+}

+

+create_virtual_env() {

+    local manager="$1"

+    local plugin="$2"

+    local name="$3"

+    log_action "create_virtual_env" "$manager" "$plugin" "$name"

+}

+

+# Main execution

+''')

+

+    # Add dry run message

+    script_parts.append('if [ -n "$DRY_RUN" ]; then\n')

+    script_parts.append('    echo "Dry run mode - no actions will be executed"\n')

+    script_parts.append('fi\n\n')

+

+    # Add action execution in order

+    script_parts.append('# Execute actions from plan\n\n')

+

+    for module in plan_output.get('modules', []):

+        for action in module.get('actions', []):

+            act_type = action['type']

+            if act_type == 'install_package':

+                manager = action['manager'].replace('"', '\\"')

+                pkg = action['package'].replace('"', '\\"')

+                script_parts.append(f'install_package "{manager}" "{pkg}"\n')

+            elif act_type == 'install_application':

+                manager = action['manager'].replace('"', '\\"')

+                app = action['application'].replace('"', '\\"')

+                script_parts.append(f'install_application "{manager}" "{app}"\n')

+            elif act_type == 'link':

+                source = action['source'].replace('"', '\\"')

+                dest = action['destination'].replace('"', '\\"')

+                script_parts.append(f'link_action "{source}" "{dest}"\n')

+            elif act_type == 'copy':

+                source = action['source'].replace('"', '\\"')

+                dest = action['destination'].replace('"', '\\"')

+                script_parts.append(f'copy_action "{source}" "{dest}"\n')

+            elif act_type == 'run':

+                source = action['source'].replace('"', '\\"')

+                script_parts.append(f'run_action "{source}"\n')

+            elif act_type == 'set_preference':

+                name = action['name'].replace('"', '\\"')

+                script_parts.append(f'set_preference "{name}"\n')

+            elif act_type == 'configure_dock':

+                num_items = len(action['items'])

+                script_parts.append(f'configure_dock "{num_items}" items\n')

+            elif act_type == 'install_runtime':

+                manager = action['manager'].replace('"', '\\"')

+                language = action['language'].replace('"', '\\"')

+                version = action['version'].replace('"', '\\"')

+                script_parts.append(f'install_runtime "{manager}" "{language}" "{version}"\n')

+            elif act_type == 'install_plugin':

+                manager = action['manager'].replace('"', '\\"')

+                plugin = action['plugin'].replace('"', '\\"')

+                script_parts.append(f'install_plugin "{manager}" "{plugin}"\n')

+            elif act_type == 'create_virtual_env':

+                manager = action['manager'].replace('"', '\\"')

+                plugin = action['plugin'].replace('"', '\\"')

+                name = action['name'].replace('"', '\\"')

+                script_parts.append(f'create_virtual_env "{manager}" "{plugin}" "{name}"\n')

+

+    return ''.join(script_parts)

+

+

+def build_command(base_dir: str, os_filter: str, os_version_filter: Optional[str],

+                  profile_name: Optional[str], output_dir: Optional[str],

+                  release: bool) -> int:

+    """Implement the 'build' command to generate standalone packages."""

+    import shutil

+    import tarfile

+    import gzip

+

+    base_path = Path(base_dir)

+    if not base_path.exists():

+        print(json.dumps({"error": "directory not found"}), file=sys.stderr)

+        return 1

+

+    global dock_configs_found

+    dock_configs_found = []

+

+    # Try to find manifest

+    manifest_data = discover_manifest(base_path)

+    manifest = None

+

+    if manifest_data:

+        try:

+            manifest = parse_manifest(manifest_data, base_path)

+        except ValidationError as e:

+            # Profile validation errors should fail before creating packages

+            if e.error_type in (ErrorType.UNKNOWN_PROFILE, ErrorType.CIRCULAR_INHERITANCE,

+                                 ErrorType.INVALID_PROFILE, ErrorType.NO_MANIFEST):

+                print(e.to_json(), file=sys.stderr)

+                return 1

+            raise

+

+    # Determine which profiles to build

+    profiles_to_build = []

+

+    if profile_name:

+        # Build specific profile

+        if not manifest:

+            print(json.dumps({"error": "no_manifest", "details": "no manifest found but --profile was specified"}), file=sys.stderr)

+            return 1

+        try:

+            resolved = resolve_profile(manifest, profile_name)

+            profiles_to_build.append((profile_name, resolved))

+        except ValidationError as e:

+            if e.error_type == ErrorType.UNKNOWN_PROFILE:

+                print(json.dumps({

+                    "error": "unknown_profile",

+                    "details": f"unknown profile '{profile_name}'"

+                }, file=sys.stderr), file=sys.stderr)

+                return 1

+            elif e.error_type == ErrorType.CIRCULAR_INHERITANCE:

+                print(json.dumps({

+                    "error": "circular_inheritance",

+                    "cycle": e.details.get("cycle", [])

+                }, file=sys.stderr), file=sys.stderr)

+                return 1

+            raise

+    elif manifest:

+        # Build all leaf profiles sorted alphabetically

+        leaf_profiles = find_leaf_profiles(manifest)

+

+        # Validate all leaf profiles before building

+        configs = discover_configs(base_path)

+        modules = parse_module_configs(configs, base_path, os_filter)

+        available_modules = set(modules.keys())

+

+        invalid_profiles = []

+        for profile_name_leaf in leaf_profiles:

+            try:

+                resolved = resolve_profile(manifest, profile_name_leaf)

+                missing = [m for m in resolved if m not in available_modules]

+                if missing:

+                    missing.sort()

+                    invalid_profiles.append((profile_name_leaf, missing))

+            except ValidationError as e:

+                if e.error_type == ErrorType.CIRCULAR_INHERITANCE:

+                    print(json.dumps({

+                        "error": "circular_inheritance",

+                        "cycle": e.details.get("cycle", [])

+                    }, file=sys.stderr), file=sys.stderr)

+                    return 1

+                raise

+

+        if invalid_profiles:

+            # Report alphabetically first invalid profile

+            profile_name_leaf, missing_modules = invalid_profiles[0]

+            print(json.dumps({

+                "error": "invalid_profile",

+                "profile": profile_name_leaf,

+                "missing_modules": missing_modules

+            }, file=sys.stderr), file=sys.stderr)

+            return 1

+

+        for profile_name_leaf in leaf_profiles:

+            resolved = resolve_profile(manifest, profile_name_leaf)

+            profiles_to_build.append((profile_name_leaf, resolved))

+    else:

+        # No manifest - build default profile

+        profiles_to_build.append(("default", []))

+

+    # Validate all configs (core checks)

+    configs = discover_configs(base_path)

+    all_valid = True

+    validation_results = []

+

+    for file_path, content in configs:

+        errors = validate_config(content, file_path)

+        valid = len(errors) == 0

+        if not valid:

+            all_valid = False

+

+        file_result = {

+            "path": str(file_path.relative_to(base_path)),

+            "valid": valid

+        }

+        if not valid:

+            file_result["errors"] = errors

+

+        validation_results.append(file_result)

+

+    if len(dock_configs_found) > 1:

+        all_valid = False

+        dock_files = [str(f.relative_to(base_path)) for f in dock_configs_found]

+        for dock_file in dock_configs_found:

+            validation_results.append({

+                "path": str(dock_file.relative_to(base_path)),

+                "valid": False,

+                "errors": [f"multiple 'dock' schemas found - only one is allowed (found in: {', '.join(dock_files)})"]

+            })

+

+    if os_version_filter and os_version_filter not in OS_VERSIONS:

+        print(json.dumps({

+            "error": "unknown_os_version",

+            "details": f"unknown version '{os_version_filter}'"

+        }, file=sys.stderr), file=sys.stderr)

+        return 1

+

+    if not all_valid:

+        validation_results.sort(key=lambda x: x["path"])

+        print(json.dumps({

+            "error": "validation_failed",

+            "details": {"valid": False, "files": validation_results}

+        }, file=sys.stderr), file=sys.stderr)

+        return 1

+

+    # Parse configs into ModuleConfig objects

+    all_modules = parse_module_configs(configs, base_path, os_filter)

+

+    # Build packages for each profile

+    packages_output = []

+    output_dir_path = Path(output_dir) if output_dir else None

+

+    for profile_name_build, profile_modules in profiles_to_build:

+        # Filter modules to those in the profile

+        profile_module_objs = {}

+        module_order = []  # Preserve plan order

+

+        for mod_name in profile_modules:

+            if mod_name in all_modules:

+                profile_module_objs[mod_name] = all_modules[mod_name]

+                if mod_name not in module_order:

+                    module_order.append(mod_name)

+

+        # Validate dependencies for this profile's modules

+        missing = find_missing_dependencies(profile_module_objs)

+        if missing:

+            module_name = sorted(missing.keys())[0]

+            print(json.dumps({

+                "error": "missing_dependency",

+                "module": module_name,

+                "missing": sorted(missing[module_name])

+            }, file=sys.stderr), file=sys.stderr)

+            return 1

+

+        # Check for cycles

+        cycle = detect_cycle(profile_module_objs)

+        if cycle:

+            print(json.dumps({

+                "error": "circular_dependency",

+                "cycle": cycle

+            }, file=sys.stderr), file=sys.stderr)

+            return 1

+

+        # Topological sort

+        sorted_modules = topological_sort(profile_module_objs)

+

+        # Generate module plans

+        plan_modules = []

+        conflict_data: dict = {}

+

+        for module in sorted_modules:

+            plan = generate_module_plan(module, os_filter, os_version_filter)

+            plan_modules.append(plan)

+

+            conflict_data[module.name] = {

+                "file_actions": [

+                    a for a in plan["actions"]

+                    if a["type"] in ("link", "copy")

+                ]

+            }

+

+        # Check for conflicts

+        conflict_json = detect_conflicts(conflict_data)

+        if conflict_json:

+            print(json.dumps(conflict_json, indent=2), file=sys.stderr)

+            return 1

+

+        # Determine package directory

+        if output_dir_path:

+            package_dir = output_dir_path / f"{profile_name_build}-package"

+        else:

+            package_dir = Path(f"/tmp/{profile_name_build}-package")

+

+        # Create package directory

+        if package_dir.exists():

+            # Remove existing package directory contents

+            shutil.rmtree(package_dir)

+        package_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

+

+        # Get referenced source files

+        source_files = get_referenced_source_files(profile_module_objs)

+

+        # Copy source files to package

+        copied_files = copy_source_files(source_files, package_dir, base_path)

+

+        # Generate and write installer script

+        plan_output = {"modules": plan_modules}

+        installer_script = generate_installer_script(os_filter, plan_output)

+        installer_path = package_dir / "install.sh"

+        installer_path.write_text(installer_script)

+        installer_path.chmod(0o755)

+

+        # Create archive if --release

+        archive_path = None

+        if release:

+            if output_dir_path:

+                archive_path = output_dir_path / f"{profile_name_build}-package.tar.gz"

+            else:

+                archive_path = Path(f"/tmp/{profile_name_build}-package.tar.gz")

+

+            # Create tar.gz archive

+            with tarfile.open(archive_path, "w:gz") as tar:

+                tar.add(package_dir, arcname=package_dir.name)

+

+        # Build package output entry

+        package_entry = {

+            "profile": profile_name_build,

+            "os": os_filter,

+            "directory": str(package_dir),

+            "modules": module_order  # Plan order, not alphabetical

+        }

+        if archive_path:

+            package_entry["archive"] = str(archive_path)

+

+        packages_output.append(package_entry)

+

+    # Sort packages alphabetically by profile name

+    packages_output.sort(key=lambda x: x["profile"])

+

+    # Output JSON to STDOUT

+    output = {"packages": packages_output}

+    print(json.dumps(output, indent=2))

+

+    return 0

+

+

 def main():

     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(

         description="Generate JSON execution plan for system preferences, dock layout, and environments."

+    build_parser.add_argument("--os", dest="os_filter", required=True, choices=["macos", "linux"], help="Target OS (required)")

+    build_parser.add_argument("--os-version", dest="os_version_filter", help="Filter by OS version (affects preferences only)")

+    build_parser.add_argument("--profile", dest="profile_name", help="Profile to build (defaults to leaf profiles or 'default')")

+    build_parser.add_argument("--output", dest="output_dir", help="Output directory for generated packages")

+        exit_code = build_command(

+            args.dir,

--- test-build/work-package/install.sh
+++ test-build/work-package/install.sh
@@ -0,0 +1,123 @@
+#!/bin/bash

+# Rig installer - generated build artifact

+# Runs from package directory

+

+set -euo pipefail

+

+DRY_RUN="${DRY_RUN:-}"

+

+# Get the directory where this script is located

+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"

+

+# Change to script directory to ensure relative paths work

+cd "$SCRIPT_DIR"

+

+log_action() {

+    local prefix="[rig]"

+    local action="$1"

+    shift

+    if [ -n "$DRY_RUN" ]; then

+        echo "$prefix $action $*"

+    fi

+}

+

+execute_install() {

+    local manager="$1"

+    local target="$2"

+    case "$manager" in

+        brew)

+            brew install "$target"

+            ;;

+        apt)

+            sudo apt-get install -y "$target"

+            ;;

+        yum)

+            sudo yum install -y "$target"

+            ;;

+        *)

+            echo "Unknown manager: $manager"

+            exit 1

+            ;;

+    esac

+}

+

+install_package() {

+    local manager="$1"

+    local package="$2"

+    log_action "install_package" "$manager" "$package"

+    if [ -z "$DRY_RUN" ]; then

+        execute_install "$manager" "$package"

+    fi

+}

+

+install_application() {

+    local manager="$1"

+    local application="$2"

+    log_action "install_application" "$manager" "$application"

+    if [ -z "$DRY_RUN" ]; then

+        execute_install "$manager" "$application"

+    fi

+}

+

+link_action() {

+    local source="$1"

+    local destination="$2"

+    log_action "link" "$source" "$destination"

+    if [ -z "$DRY_RUN" ]; then

+        mkdir -p "$(dirname "$destination")" && ln -sf "$SCRIPT_DIR/$source" "$destination"

+    fi

+}

+

+copy_action() {

+    local source="$1"

+    local destination="$2"

+    log_action "copy" "$source" "$destination"

+    if [ -z "$DRY_RUN" ]; then

+        mkdir -p "$(dirname "$destination")" && cp -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/$source" "$destination"

+    fi

+}

+

+run_action() {

+    local source="$1"

+    log_action "run" "$source"

+    if [ -z "$DRY_RUN" ]; then

+        bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/$source"

+    fi

+}

+

+set_preference() {

+    log_action "set_preference" "$1"

+}

+

+configure_dock() {

+    log_action "configure_dock" "$@"

+}

+

+install_runtime() {

+    local manager="$1"

+    local language="$2"

+    local version="$3"

+    log_action "install_runtime" "$manager" "$language" "$version"

+}

+

+install_plugin() {

+    local manager="$1"

+    local plugin="$2"

+    log_action "install_plugin" "$manager" "$plugin"

+}

+

+create_virtual_env() {

+    local manager="$1"

+    local plugin="$2"

+    local name="$3"

+    log_action "create_virtual_env" "$manager" "$plugin" "$name"

+}

+

+# Main execution

+if [ -n "$DRY_RUN" ]; then

+    echo "Dry run mode - no actions will be executed"

+fi

+

+# Execute actions from plan

+

+install_package "brew" "coreutils"
